modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to send documents to multiple recipients in DocuSign.

full_description_text:  
I'm trying to send the same document to a bunch of people at once in DocuSign, but I can't figure out how to do it. It seems like there should be an easy way to send it to multiple recipients simultaneously, but I'm stuck. Any help would be appreciated!
short_description: Unable to send documents to multiple recipients in DocuSign.
description: I'm trying to send the same document to a bunch of people at once in DocuSign, but I can't figure out how to do it. It seems like there should be an easy way to send it to multiple recipients simultaneously, but I'm stuck. Any help would be appreciated!
